inputs.label: Total Repair Orders (monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of repair orders completed in the period (ISO 9001:2015 clause 8.5.1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of repair orders completed in the period (ISO 9001:2015 clause 8.5.1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönemde tamamlanan toplam onarım emri sayısı (ISO 9001:2015 madde 8.5.1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im Zeitraum abgeschlossenen Reparaturaufträge (ISO 9001:2015 Klausel 8.5.1).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'ordres de réparation terminés sur la période (ISO 9001:2015 clause 8.5.1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de órdenes de reparación completadas en el período (ISO 9001:2015 cláusula 8.5.1).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد أوامر الإصلاح المنجزة في الفترة (الفقرة 8.5.1 من ISO 9001:2015).

inputs.label: Comeback Count (monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Number of repair orders that returned for rework within warranty or service period (Six Sigma DPMO metric)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of repair orders that returned for rework within warranty or service period (Six Sigma DPMO metric)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Garanti veya servis süresi içinde yeniden işlem için geri dönen onarım emri sayısı (Altı Sigma DPMO metriği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Reparaturaufträge, die innerhalb der Garantie- oder Servicefrist zur Nacharbeit zurückkamen (Six Sigma DPMO-Kennzahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'ordres de réparation revenus pour reprise sous garantie ou période de service (métrique Six Sigma DPMO)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de órdenes de reparación que regresaron para retrabajo dentro del período de garantía o servicio (métrica Seis Sigma DPMO).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد أوامر الإصلاح التي عادت لإعادة العمل ضمن فترة الضمان أو الخدمة (مقياس DPMO في ستة سيجما).

inputs.label: Average Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened labor rate including overhead (WERC DC Measures)

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra promedio

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened labor rate including overhead (WERC DC Measures)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genel giderler dahil tam yüklü işçilik ücreti (WERC DC Ölçütleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Voll belasteter Stundensatz inklusive Gemeinkosten (WERC DC Measures).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de main-d'œuvre entièrement chargé incluant les frais généraux (WERC DC Measures)
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra totalmente cargada, incluyendo gastos generales (Medidas de centro de distribución WERC).
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر العمالة الكامل بما في ذلك التكاليف العامة (مقاييس مراكز التوزيع WERC).

inputs.label: Average Hours per Comeback
inputs.businessContext: Average technician hours spent diagnosing and re-repairing a comeback (Lean Takt time impact)

businessContext_i18n.en: Average technician hours spent diagnosing and re-repairing a comeback (Lean Takt time impact)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir geri dönüşü teşhis ve yeniden onarım için harcanan ortalama teknisyen saati (Yalın Takt süresi etkisi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Technikerstunden für Diagnose und erneute Reparatur eines Wiederholungsauftrags (Lean Taktzeit-Auswirkung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures technicien moyennes consacrées au diagnostic et à la reprise d'un retour (impact Lean Temps de takt)
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas promedio de técnico dedicadas a diagnosticar y reparar un reingreso (impacto en tiempo de takt Lean).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط ساعات الفني المستغرقة في تشخيص وإعادة إصلاح العودة (تأثير وقت التاكت في اللين).

inputs.label: Average Parts Cost per Comeback
inputs.businessContext: Replacement parts and materials consumed per comeback (ISO 14001 waste reduction)

label_i18n.tr: Geri Dönüş Başına Ortalama Parça Maliyeti
label_i18n.fr: Coût moyen des pièces par retour
label_i18n.es: Costo promedio de piezas por reingreso
label_i18n.ar: متوسط تكلفة قطع الغيار لكل عودة

businessContext_i18n.en: Replacement parts and materials consumed per comeback (ISO 14001 waste reduction)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri dönüş başına tüketilen yedek parça ve malzemeler (ISO 14001 atık azaltımı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Verbrauchte Ersatzteile und Materialien pro Wiederholungsauftrag (ISO 14001 Abfallreduzierung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pièces de rechange et matériaux consommés par retour (réduction des déchets ISO 14001)
businessContext_i18n.es: Piezas de repuesto y materiales consumidos por reingreso (reducción de desperdicio ISO 14001).
businessContext_i18n.ar: قطع الغيار والمواد المستهلكة لكل عودة (تقليل الهدر وفق ISO 14001).

inputs.label: Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated net profit from a loyal customer over their relationship with the shop

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated net profit from a loyal customer over their relationship with the shop
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sadık bir müşterinin atölye ile ilişkisi boyunca tahmini net karı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Nettogewinn eines treuen Kunden über die gesamte Geschäftsbeziehung zur Werkstatt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Bénéfice net estimé d'un client fidèle sur sa relation avec l'atelier
businessContext_i18n.es: Ganancia neta estimada de un cliente leal durante su relación con el taller.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الربح الصافي المقدر من عميل مخلص على مدار علاقته بالورشة.

inputs.label: Lost Customer Rate per Comeback
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of customers who never return after a comeback experience (Net Promoter Score correlation)

label_i18n.tr: Geri Dönüş Başına Kaybedilen Müşteri Oranı
label_i18n.fr: Taux de clients perdus par retour
label_i18n.es: Tasa de clientes perdidos por reingreso

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of customers who never return after a comeback experience (Net Promoter Score correlation)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir geri dönüş deneyiminden sonra bir daha asla gelmeyen müşterilerin yüzdesi (Net Tavsiye Skoru korelasyonu)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Kunden, die nach einem Comeback-Erlebnis nie wiederkehren (Net Promoter Score-Korrelation)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de clients qui ne reviennent jamais après une expérience de retour (corrélation Net Promoter Score)
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de clientes que nunca regresan después de una experiencia de recuperación (correlación con Net Promoter Score)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة العملاء الذين لا يعودون أبدًا بعد تجربة العودة (ارتباط صافي نقاط الترويج)

inputs.label: Shop Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of repair facility influences overhead multipliers (ASA industry standards)

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of repair facility influences overhead multipliers (ASA industry standards)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Onarım tesisi türü, genel gider çarpanlarını etkiler (ASA endüstri standartları)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le type d'installation de réparation influence les multiplicateurs de frais généraux (normes ASA)
businessContext_i18n.es: El tipo de instalación de reparación influye en los multiplicadores de gastos generales (estándares de la industria ASA)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نوع منشأة الإصلاح يؤثر على مضاعفات التكاليف العامة (معايير صناعة ASA)

rules.message: Comeback count cannot exceed total repair orders.
Average hours per comeback must be greater than zero.
Customer lifetime value must be positive.
Lost customer rate must be between 0 and 100 percent.

thresholds.message: Comeback rate exceeds 10% — immediate process improvement required (Six Sigma DPMO > 100,000).
Comeback rate between 5% and 10% — investigate root causes (ISO 9001 corrective action).
Estimated lost future revenue exceeds $10,000 — customer retention strategy needed.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
